prose: Furan frontier orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO energy difference) calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier standard, with density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, neutral singlet, on the user-supplied geometry as a single-point calculation. SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO = −6.3597638 eV, LUMO = −0.1024036 eV, gap = 6.2573602 eV. No warnings reported. Calculation integrity verified as trustworthy.
